column1: Luis Arraez leads the slate with exceptional consistency, hitting safely in over 77% of games and benefitting from a favorable home matchup against Bryce Elder. Alec Burleson offers strong support, riding a hot stretch and taking advantage of a park boost and platoon edge. Jeremy Pena and Jackson Chourio also bring reliability at the top of their respective lineups, but Arraez’s steady approach and track record make him the most dependable pick for Beat The Streak players today.
